definitions.text: To reach out with one's voice. To request, summon, or beckon.
examples: That person is hurt; call for help!
"Supper's ready," called Dad from the kitchen.
That person is hurt; call for help!
"Supper's ready," called Dad from the kitchen.
He heard a call from the other side of the room.

definitions.text: The characteristic cry of a bird or other animal.
examples: That sound is the distinctive call of the cuckoo bird.
I had to yield to the call of the wild.
